name: sg07-frontmatter-spoofing
description: Structural check: compares SKILL.md's declared network/filesystem scope against the actual behavior implied by its hooks/scripts (src/ast/frontmatter-behavior-diff.ts). A structural pack ships no Semgrep-style rules file — the comparison logic ships in core since it needs a parsed view of both the manifest and the script set together, not a single-file pattern match.
